purpose: Validate a source-bound, signed, no-action AEGIS single-constraint CBF/QP producer and its CTDA v2 hard-block adapter, including direct numerical parity with the pinned controller's CVXPY/OSQP formulation.

mirrored_semantics: world-to-end-effector reference transform and factor-five latent reference
0.2 translational and rotational CBF coefficient and command scaling
factor-ten direction reference and class-K h term
diagonal quadratic weights (1/25 for six motion terms, 1 for three direction terms)
projected direction Euler update at dt=0.05 followed by normalization

qp_reference.fixtures: five frozen outcome-blind synthetic coefficient cases

coverage: exact AEGIS commit, tree, clean worktree, source-file hashes, and mirrored source statements
admissible nominal command preservation and signed full-result evidence
active weighted projection to the CBF boundary
stale, foreign-source, and degenerate constraints become UNKNOWN
signed projection reaches CTDA prefix authorization with dispatch_count zero
full-result tamper becomes HARD_BLOCK before authorization
analytical solution parity with CVXPY/OSQP on admissible, active, rotated, direction-update, and infeasible fixtures
claim_boundary: Passing establishes source identity, closed-form numerical equivalence for the frozen synthetic fixtures, complete result signing, fail-closed CTDA binding, and zero action/dispatch for the no-action producer. It does not establish trustworthy perception or coefficient provenance, correctness of compute_h_coeffs_3d, secure production keys, multi-constraint behavior, simulator rollout safety, attack reproduction, or physical deployment safety.
next_gate: Build a typed source-derived coefficient/provenance producer from pinned AEGIS geometry inputs, then freeze outcome-blind numeric progress/recovery budgets on disjoint data before any clean pilot.
